info.name: X2Mail
info.summary: Webmail with native XOAUTH2/OAUTHBEARER SSO support
info.author: x2mail
info.description:
**X2Mail — Feature-rich webmail client for Nextcloud with native Single Sign-On support via XOAUTH2 and OAUTHBEARER.**
Works with Keycloak, Authentik, and any OpenID Connect provider. Powered by SnappyMail engine.
- **Native XOAUTH2/OAUTHBEARER support** - **Auto token refresh for seamless SSO** - **Works with user_oidc and oidc_login** - **Dark mode and responsive design** - **Full Sieve filtering support** - **Integration with Nextcloud** (Contacts, Files, Calendar, Unified Search) - **Multiple mail accounts and identities** - **OpenPGP and S/MIME encryption**
